action_set_definitions.name: fetch_latest_screening_alert
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the most recent facility-specific screening alert for a trial protocol to identify the target patient and the environment timestamp.

action_set_definitions.name: get_trial_protocol_criteria
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full set of inclusion and exclusion criteria for a trial, including lab threshold logic, medication window requirements, and clinical condition SNOMED codes.

action_set_definitions.name: get_patient_clinical_history
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves diagnostic records, clinical staging, and SNOMED-coded conditions for a specific patient.

action_set_definitions.name: get_patient_medication_history
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a history of medications administered to a patient with associated administration dates.

action_set_definitions.name: get_patient_lab_results
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves laboratory assay results for a specific patient and identifies the facility that processed the lab.

assay_type.description: The name of the lab test, e.g., 'AST'.

action_set_definitions.name: get_site_lab_reference_standard
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves site-specific laboratory reference standards (Upper Limit of Normal) for a specific facility and assay.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_eligibility_status
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes the evaluation by submitting the eligibility status and rationale for the patient matching process.

state_description.current_patient_context: Contains the demographic and clinical data of the patient currently under evaluation.
state_description.loaded_trials_registry: A list of clinical trials currently loaded into the active memory for matching.
state_description.matching_log: A history of specific criteria checks (Inclusion/Exclusion) performed during the current session.
state_description.system_status: The current operational mode of the environment (e.g., 'IDLE', 'PATIENT_LOADED', 'MATCHING_IN_PROGRESS').

loaded_trials_registry.title: Adaptive Immunotherapy Trial for Advanced NSCLC
inclusion_criteria: Documented Stage IV Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC)
Prior treatment with Pembrolizumab (RxNorm: 1547504) within 180 days of screening
AST <= 2.5x Upper Limit of Normal (ULN) based on facility reference standards

matching_log.message: Potential candidate P-4492 identified at Northside Specialty Center; requires manual verification of site-specific lab thresholds and staging.
